DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANTS ROBERT HOWALD AND SARAH HOWALD'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. THE COURT HAS READ AND CONSIDERED THE LATE-FILED DECLARATION. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SERVE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED AS THERE IS NO DECLARATION SUBMITTED PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 2023.040. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/fee paid. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. (212)

Off Calendar Sep-17-2007 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motin For Evidence And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Robert Howald's motion for evidentiary and monetary sanctions is granted in part and denied in part. The Court has read and considered the late-filed opposition. The motion for evidentiary sanctions is denied. The motion for monetary sanctions is granted. Plaintiff shall comply with the previous order within 10 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $750 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Oct-04-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's Robert Howald and Sarah Howald motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. The Court has read and considered the late-filed declaration. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. The request for monetary sanctions is denied as there is no declaration submitted pursuant to CCP Section 2023.040. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
